articles.title: IPL 2026: Crisis-hit Kolkata Knight Riders brace for tough Rajasthan Royals test
articles.description: Kolkata Knight Riders are struggling at the halfway stage of the IPL with no wins, facing a daunting task to turn their season around. Skipper Ajinkya Rahane's leadership and confusing batting order decisions, particularly for Cameron Green, have drawn criticism. They now face a Rajasthan Royals side looking to rebound after a recent loss.

articles.title: What Dexter Lawrence blockbuster trade reveals about Bengals’ urgency and Giants’ long-term strategy shift
articles.description: Dexter Lawrence’s move from the Giants to the Bengals is a rare pre-draft trade that impacts both strategy and identity. New York gains flexibility with two top-10 picks but must replace a cornerstone defender. Cincinnati, meanwhile, prioritizes immediate defensive improvement over draft potential, signaling urgency around Joe Burrow’s prime years. The deal reflects contrasting team philosophies but a shared need for clarity before the draft.

articles.title: IPL 2026: Entertainment guaranteed, but conditions apply!
articles.description: Cameron Green has resumed bowling, but his earlier bowling restriction disrupted KKR’s balance, especially as injuries and absences depleted its frontline attack.

articles.title: Four big takeaways from the Dexter Lawrence trade: Barnwell sizes up the Bengals' shocking move
articles.description: The Giants traded Lawrence to the Bengals for the No. 10 pick in the draft. What does that say about the NFL's trade market, this draft class and the state of the Bengals?

articles.title: From Ballboys To Hometown Heroes: Real Sociedad's Fairytale Comes True In Copa Del Rey
articles.description: Heaven for Marrero and Marin, while it's heartbreak for a departing Griezmann --Real Sociedad beat Atletico Madrid in a dramatic shootout to win the Copa del Rey in Seville.

articles.description: Grandmaster R. Vaishali, having won the Women’s Candidates title, returned to Chennai on Sunday, and will now prepare for a World Championship clash against Ju Wenjun.

articles.title: Will Matheesha Pathirana play in KKR’s crucial game against RR in IPL 2026?
articles.description: Matheesha Pathirana was supposed to be one of the key names in KKR bowling line-up. However, injury to him and other leading bowlers has left KKR in trouble this season.

articles.title: Sources: Giants flip Lawrence for Bengals' pick
articles.description: The Giants are trading DT Dexter Lawrence to the Bengals in a deal for the No. 10 pick in next week's NFL draft, sources told ESPN.

articles.title: Mike Vrabel’s fate decided as NFL breaks silence on Patriots coach amid explosive Dianna Russini photo controversy
articles.description: The NFL has opted not to investigate Mike Vrabel following his involvement in a widely discussed photo controversy with Dianna Russini. Despite public speculation and Russini’s resignation from The Athletic, the league found no grounds to review Vrabel under its personal conduct policy. While this clears him of league discipline, uncertainty remains around whether the Patriots will take internal action, leaving the situation partially unresolved.

articles.title: Sangakkara says Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is 'allowed to fail', reveals message to teen sensation: 'Less said, the better'

articles.title: How SRH’s Shivang Kumar played an underrated role in denying CSK a hat-trick of wins: ‘He was the difference’
articles.description: While there were several individuals who produced important contributions in SRH’s 10-run victory over CSK, it was left-arm wrist spinner Shivang Kumar who flew under the radar with his haul of 1/18 from three overs.

articles.title: IShowSpeed Height and Weight: Streamer Makes WWE Debut at WrestleMania 42 Alongside Logan Paul
articles.description: Born Darren Watkins Jr. on January 21, 2005, in Cincinnati, Ohio, IShowSpeed is one of the most watched online creators in the world. He built his following through high-energy gaming streams, real-life content and a raw, unfiltered on-camera personality on YouTube.

articles.title: Durant out for Game 1 vs. Lakers with knee injury
articles.description: The Houston Rockets will be without star Kevin Durant for Game 1 of their first-round series against the Los Angeles Lakers because of a right knee injury sustained at practice this week.
